title: QuizPublishPayload
description: Logical payload for creating a quiz round (after operator FSM or future import). Used for validation before sendMessage.

target.description: Maps to PLAY_CHAT_ID or TEST_CHAT_ID via destinations resolver

posted_by_line.description: Exact text for the final line of the public quiz message (Telegram operator attribution per FR-008a). In the DM publish flow, omit and derive from the operator’s Telegram User; MCP or other callers MUST supply it when no Telegram User is available.
